query:
WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO
        "transaction" (
            transaction_hash,
            account_id,
            "status",
            allowance_spent_gas,
            allowance_spent_inner
        )
    VALUES
        ($1, $2, 'pending'::transaction_status, $3, $4)
    RETURNING
        transaction_hash
)
UPDATE
    account
SET
    pending_transaction_hash = (
        SELECT
            transaction_hash
        FROM
            inserted
    )
WHERE
    account_id = $2
    AND pending_transaction_hash IS NULL
RETURNING
    pending_transaction_hash
